JANUARY
------------------------------------------------------------
  1  Thu     Circumcision of Our Lord                   [2cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w
  2  Fri  L  Octave Day of St Stephen                   [s]   r
  3  Sat     Octave Day of St. John, Apostle & Evangelist [s]   w
           Vespers: I fol. w (Holy Name of Jesus)
  4  Sun     Holy Name of Jesus                         [2cl] w
           Com: Octave Day of the Holy Innocents
           Com: St. Titus, Bishop & Confessor
           Vespers: II prec. w
  5  Mon     The Vigil of the Epiphany                  [sd]  w
           Com: St. Telesphorus of Rome, Bishop & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. w (Epiphany of Our Lord)
  6  Tue     EPIPHANY OF OUR LORD                       [1cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w
  7  Wed     Day II within the Octave of the Epiphany   [sd]  w
  8  Thu     Day III within the Octave of the Epiphany  [sd]  w
  9  Fri  L  Day IV within the Octave of the Epiphany   [sd]  w
 10  Sat     Day V within the Octave of the Epiphany    [sd]  w
           Com: St. Paul the First Hermit
           Vespers: I fol. w (Sunday within the Octave of Epiphany)
 11  Sun     Sunday within the Octave of Epiphany       [sd]  w
           Com: St. Hyginus of Rome, Bishop & Martyr
           Com: Day VI within the Octave of the Epiphany
           Vespers: II prec. w
 12  Mon     Day VII within the Octave of the Epiphany  [sd]  w
           Com: St. Benedict Biscop, Abbot
           Vespers: I fol. w (Octave Day of the Epiphany)
 13  Tue     Octave Day of the Epiphany                 [gd]  w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 14  Wed     St. Hilary, Bishop, Confessor & Doctor     [d]   w
           Com: St. Felix of Nola, Priest & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. w (St Maurus, Abbot)
 15  Thu     St Maurus, Abbot                           [gd]  w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 16  Fri  L  Feria                                            g
           Com: St. Marcellus I of Rome, Pope & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. w (St. Anthony of Egypt)
 17  Sat     St. Anthony of Egypt                       [d]   w
           Vespers: I fol. g (II Sunday after Epiphany)
 18  Sun     II Sunday after Epiphany                   [sd]  g
           Com: Chair of St Peter in Rome
           Com: Commemoration of St Paul
           Com: St. Prisca of Rome, Virgin Martyr
           Vespers: II prec. g
 19  Mon     Feria                                            g
           Com: Ss. Marius, Martha, Audifax, & Abachum, Martyrs
           Com: St. Mark of Ephesus, Bishop & Confessor
           Vespers: I fol. r (Ss. Fabian (Bishop) & Sebastian, Martyrs)
 20  Tue     Ss. Fabian (Bishop) & Sebastian, Martyrs   [d]   r
           Vespers: I fol. r (St. Agnes of Rome, Virgin & Martyr)
 21  Wed     St. Agnes of Rome, Virgin & Martyr         [gd]  r
           Vespers: II prec. r
 22  Thu     Feria                                            g
           Com: Ss Vincent, Martyr
 23  Fri  L  Feria                                            g
           Com: St. Emerentiana, Virgin & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. r (St Timothy, Bishop & Martyr)
 24  Sat     St Timothy, Bishop & Martyr                [d]   r
           Vespers: I fol. g (III Sunday after Epiphany)
 25  Sun     III Sunday after Epiphany                  [sd]  g
           Com: Conversion of St. Paul
           Com: Commemoration of St. Peter
           Vespers: II prec. g
 26  Mon     Feria                                            g
           Com: St. Polycarp of Smyrna, Bishop & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. w (St. John Chrysostom, Bishop, Confessor & Doctor)
 27  Tue     St. John Chrysostom, Bishop, Confessor & Doctor [d]   w
           Vespers: I fol. w (St Cyril of Alexandria, Confessor, Bishop & Doctor)
 28  Wed     St Cyril of Alexandria, Confessor, Bishop & Doctor [d]   w
           Com: The Second Feast of St. Agnes, Virgin Martyr
           Vespers: II prec. w
 29  Thu     Feria                                            g
 30  Fri  L  Feria                                            g
           Com: St. Martina, Virgin & Martyr
 31  Sat     Saturday Office of the B.V.M               [s]   w
           Vespers: I fol. g (IV Sunday after Epiphany)

FEBRUARY
------------------------------------------------------------
  1  Sun     IV Sunday after Epiphany                   [sd]  g
           Com: St Ignatius of Antioch, Bishop & Martyr
           Com: St Bridget of Ireland, Virgin
           Vespers: I fol. w (Purification of the Blessed Virgin Mary)
  2  Mon     Purification of the Blessed Virgin Mary    [2cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w
  3  Tue     Feria                                            g
           Com: St Blaise, Bishop & Martyr
  4  Wed     Feria                                            g
           Com: St Joseph of Aleppo, Martyr
           Com: The New Martyrs of Russia
           Vespers: I fol. r (St. Agatha)
  5  Thu     St. Agatha                                 [gd]  r
           Vespers: II prec. r
  6  Fri  L  Feria                                            g
           Com: St Dorothy, Virgin & Martyr
           Com: St Photius, Bishop and Confessor
           Vespers: I fol. w (St Romuald, Abbot)
  7  Sat     St Romuald, Abbot                          [d]   w
           Vespers: I fol. v (Septuagesima Sunday)
  8  Sun     Septuagesima Sunday                        [2cl] v
           Vespers: II prec. v
  9  Mon     Feria                                            v
           Com: St Apollonia of Alexandria, Virgin & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. v (St Scholastica, Virgin)
 10  Tue     St Scholastica, Virgin                     [gd]  v
           Vespers: II prec. v
 11  Wed     Feria                                            v
           Com: St Gregory II, Pope & Confessor
 12  Thu     Feria                                            v
 13  Fri  L  Feria                                            v
 14  Sat     Feria                                            v
           Com: St Valentine, Priest & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. v (Sexagesima Sunday)
 15  Sun     Sexagesima Sunday                          [2cl] v
           Com: Ss. Faustinus & Jovita, Martyrs
           Vespers: II prec. v
 16  Mon     Feria                                            v
 17  Tue     Feria                                            v
 18  Wed     Feria                                            v
           Com: St Simeon of Jerusalem, Bishop & Martyr
 19  Thu     Feria                                            v
 20  Fri  L  Feria                                            v
 21  Sat     Feria                                            v
           Vespers: I fol. v (Quinquagesima Sunday)
 22  Sun     Quinquagesima Sunday                       [2cl] v
           Vespers: II prec. v
 23  Mon     Chair of St. Peter at Antioch              [2cl] w
           Com: St Peter Damian, Bishop, Confessor & Doctor
           Com: Commemoration of St Paul
           Com: Vigil of St. Matthias
           Vespers: I fol. r (St. Matthias, Apostle)
 24  Tue     St. Matthias, Apostle                      [2cl] r
           Vespers: I fol. v (Ash Wednesday)
 25  Wed  L§ ASH WEDNESDAY                              [1cl] v
           Com: St Walburga of Heidenheim, Virgin
 26  Thu  L§ Feria                                            v
           Com: St. Alexander of Alexandria, Bishop & Confessor
           Vespers: I fol. v (St. Raphael of Brooklyn)
 27  Fri  L§ St. Raphael of Brooklyn                    [gd]  v
           Vespers: II prec. v
 28  Sat  L§ Feria                                            v
           Vespers: I fol. v (I Sunday in Lent)

MARCH
------------------------------------------------------------
  1  Sun  L  I SUNDAY IN LENT                           [1cl] v
           Com: St David of Wales, Bishop & Confessor
           Vespers: II prec. v
  2  Mon  L§ Monday after Lent I                              v
           Com: St Chad, Bishop & Confessor
  3  Tue  L§ Tuesday after Lent I                             v
  4  Wed  L§ Lent Ember Wednesday                       [sd]  v
           Com: St Lucius I, Pope & Martyr
  5  Thu  L§ Thursday after Lent I                            v
           Vespers: I fol. v (St Perpetua & Felicitas, Martyrs)
  6  Fri  L§ St Perpetua & Felicitas, Martyrs           [d]   v
           Com: Lent Ember Friday
           Vespers: II prec. v
  7  Sat  L§ Lent Ember Saturday                        [sd]  v
           Vespers: I fol. v (II Sunday in Lent)
  8  Sun  L  II SUNDAY IN LENT                          [1cl] v
           Vespers: II prec. v
  9  Mon  L§ Monday after Lent II                             v
           Com: St Gregory of Nyssa, Bishop, Confessor & Doctor
 10  Tue  L§ Tuesday after Lent II                            v
           Com: The Forty Holy Martyrs
 11  Wed  L§ Wednesday after Lent II                          v
           Vespers: I fol. w (St. Gregory the Great)
 12  Thu  L§ St. Gregory the Great                      [2cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 13  Fri  L§ Friday after Lent II                             v
 14  Sat  L§ Saturday after Lent II                           v
           Vespers: I fol. v (III Sunday in Lent)
 15  Sun  L  III SUNDAY IN LENT                         [1cl] v
           Vespers: II prec. v
 16  Mon  L§ Monday after Lent III                            v
           Vespers: I fol. v (St. Patrick)
 17  Tue  L§ St. Patrick                                [d]   v
           Com: St Joseph of Arimathea, C
           Vespers: I fol. v (St Cyril of Jerusalem, Bishop, Confessor & Doctor)
 18  Wed  L§ St Cyril of Jerusalem, Bishop, Confessor & Doctor [d]   v
           Com: St Edward, King & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. w (St. Joseph, Spouse of the Blessed Virgin Mary)
 19  Thu  L§ St. Joseph, Spouse of the Blessed Virgin Mary [2cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 20  Fri  L§ St. Cuthbert, Bishop & Confessor           [d]   v
           Vespers: I fol. w (St. Benedict)
 21  Sat  L§ St. Benedict                               [2cl] w
           Vespers: I fol. p (IV Sunday in Lent)
 22  Sun  L  IV SUNDAY IN LENT                          [1cl] p
           Vespers: II prec. p
 23  Mon  L§ Monday after Lent IV                             v
           Vespers: I fol. v (St. Gabriel the Archangel)
 24  Tue  L§ St. Gabriel the Archangel                  [gd]  v
           Vespers: I fol. w (Annunciation of the Blessed Virgin Mary)
 25  Wed  L§ ANNUNCIATION OF THE BLESSED VIRGIN MARY    [1cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 26  Thu  L§ Thursday after Lent IV                           v
           Vespers: I fol. v (St. John Damascene, Confessor & Doctor)
 27  Fri  L§ St. John Damascene, Confessor & Doctor     [d]   v
           Vespers: II prec. v
 28  Sat  L§ Saturday after Lent IV                           v
           Vespers: I fol. v (Sunday of the Passion)
 29  Sun  L  SUNDAY OF THE PASSION                      [1cl] v
           Vespers: II prec. v
 30  Mon  L§ Monday after Passion Sunday                      v
           Com: St John Climacus, Abbot
 31  Tue  L§ Tuesday after Passion Sunday                     v
           Com: St Innocent of Alaska, Bishop & Confessor

APRIL
------------------------------------------------------------
  1  Wed  L§ Wednesday after Passion Sunday                   v
  2  Thu  L§ Thursday after Passion Sunday                    v
           Vespers: I fol. v (Our Lady of Sorrows)
  3  Fri  L§ Our Lady of Sorrows                        [gd]  v
           Vespers: II prec. v
  4  Sat  L§ St Isidore of Seville, Bishop, Confessor & Doctor [d]   v
           Vespers: I fol. v (Palm Sunday)
  5  Sun  L  PALM SUNDAY                                [1cl] v
           Vespers: II prec. v
  6  Mon  L§ HOLY MONDAY                                [1cl] v
           Vespers: I fol. v (Holy Tuesday)
  7  Tue  L§ HOLY TUESDAY                               [1cl] v
           Vespers: I fol. v (Holy Wednesday)
  8  Wed  L§ HOLY WEDNESDAY                             [1cl] v
           Vespers: I fol. w (Holy Thursday)
  9  Thu  L§ HOLY THURSDAY                              [1cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 10  Fri  L§ GOOD FRIDAY                                [1cl] b
           Vespers: II prec. b
 11  Sat  L§ HOLY SATURDAY                              [1cl] w
           Com: St Leo the Great, Bishop, Confessor & Doctor
           Vespers: II prec. w
 12  Sun     SUNDAY OF THE RESURRECTION                 [1cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 13  Mon     EASTER MONDAY                              [1cl] w
           Com: St Hermengild, Martyr
           Vespers: II prec. w
 14  Tue     EASTER TUESDAY                             [1cl] w
           Com: St Justin, Martyr
           Com: St. Tiburtius, Valerian & Maximus, Martyrs
           Vespers: II prec. w
 15  Wed     DAY IV WITHIN THE OCTAVE OF EASTER         [1cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 16  Thu     DAY V WITHIN THE OCTAVE OF EASTER          [1cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 17  Fri     DAY VI WITHIN THE OCTAVE OF EASTER         [1cl] w
           Com: St Anicetus, Pope & Martyr
           Vespers: II prec. w
 18  Sat     DAY VII WITHIN THE OCTAVE OF EASTER        [1cl] w
           Vespers: I fol. w (Low Sunday (Octave of Easter))
 19  Sun     LOW SUNDAY (OCTAVE OF EASTER)              [1cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 20  Mon     ST. TIKHON OF MOSCOW                       [1cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 21  Tue     Feria                                            w
 22  Wed     Feria                                            w
           Com: Ss. Soter & Caius, Martyrs
           Vespers: I fol. r (St. George)
 23  Thu     ST. GEORGE                                 [1cl] r
           Vespers: II prec. r
 24  Fri  L  Day II within the Octave of St. George     [sd]  r
           Vespers: I fol. r (St. Mark, Evangelist)
 25  Sat     St. Mark, Evangelist                       [2cl] r
           Com: Day III within the Octave of St. George
           Vespers: II prec. r
 26  Sun     II Sunday after Easter                     [sd]  w
           Com: St. Cletus & Marcellinus, Martyrs
           Com: Day IV within the Octave of St. George
           Vespers: II prec. w
 27  Mon     Day V within the Octave of St. George      [sd]  r
 28  Tue     Day VI within the Octave of St. George     [sd]  r
           Com: St Vitalis, Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. w (Solemnity of St. Joseph, Spouse of the Blessed Virgin Mary)
 29  Wed     SOLEMNITY OF ST. JOSEPH, SPOUSE OF THE BLESSED VIRGIN MARY [1cl] w
           Com: Day VII within the Octave of St. George
           Vespers: II prec. w
 30  Thu     Octave Day of St. George                   [gd]  r
           Vespers: I fol. r (Ss. Philip and James, Apostles)

MAY
------------------------------------------------------------
  1  Fri  L  Ss. Philip and James, Apostles             [2cl] r
           Vespers: II prec. r
  2  Sat     St. Athanasius                             [d]   w
           Vespers: I fol. r (Finding of the Holy Cross)
  3  Sun     Finding of the Holy Cross                  [2cl] r
           Com: Ss. Alexander (Bp), Eventius, Theodulus (Mm) & Juve-
           Com: III Sunday after Easter
           Vespers: II prec. r
  4  Mon     Feria                                            w
           Com: St. Monica, Widow
  5  Tue     Feria                                            w
           Vespers: I fol. r (St. John before the Latin Gate)
  6  Wed     St. John before the Latin Gate             [gd]  r
           Com: Octave of the Solemnity of St Joseph
           Vespers: II prec. r
  7  Thu     Feria                                            w
           Com: St. Alexis Toth, Priest & Confessor
           Vespers: I fol. w (Apparition of St. Michael the Archangel)
  8  Fri  L  Apparition of St. Michael the Archangel    [gd]  w
           Com: St Boniface IV, Bishop & Confessor
           Vespers: II prec. w
  9  Sat     St. Gregory Nazianzen, Bishop, Confessor & Doctor [d]   w
           Vespers: I fol. w (IV Sunday after Easter)
 10  Sun     IV Sunday after Easter                     [sd]  w
           Com: Ss Gordian & Epimachus, Martyrs
           Vespers: II prec. w
 11  Mon     Feria                                            w
 12  Tue     Feria                                            w
           Com: Ss Nereus, Achilles, Domitilla & Pancras, Martyrs
 13  Wed     Feria                                            w
 14  Thu     Feria                                            w
           Com: St Boniface of Tarsus, Martyr
 15  Fri  L  Feria                                            w
 16  Sat     Saturday Office of the B.V.M               [s]   w
           Vespers: I fol. w (V Sunday after Easter)
 17  Sun     V Sunday after Easter                      [sd]  w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 18  Mon     St Venantius, Martyr                       [d]   r
           Vespers: II prec. r
 19  Tue     Feria                                            w
           Com: St Pudentiana, Virgin
 20  Wed     Vigil of the Ascension                     [s]   w
           Vespers: I fol. w (Ascension of Our Lord)
 21  Thu     ASCENSION OF OUR LORD                      [1cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 22  Fri  L  Day II within the Octave of the Ascension  [sd]  w
           Com: St. Romanus, Abbot
 23  Sat     Day III within the Octave of the Ascension [sd]  w
           Vespers: I fol. w (Sunday within the Octave of the Ascension)
 24  Sun     Sunday within the Octave of the Ascension  [sd]  w
           Com: St Vincent of Lerins, Confessor
           Vespers: II prec. w
 25  Mon     Day V within the Octave of the Ascension   [sd]  w
           Com: St Urban, Pope & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. w (St Augustine of Canterbury, Bishop & Confessor)
 26  Tue     St Augustine of Canterbury, Bishop & Confessor [d]   w
           Com: St Eleutherius, Pope & Martyr
           Com: Day VI within the Octave of the Ascension
           Vespers: I fol. w (St Bede the Venerable, Confessor & Doctor)
 27  Wed     St Bede the Venerable, Confessor & Doctor  [d]   w
           Com: St John I, Pope & Martyr
           Com: Day VII within the Octave of the Ascension
           Vespers: I fol. w (Octave Day of the Ascension)
 28  Thu     Octave Day of the Ascension                [gd]  w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 29  Fri  L  Feria                                            w
           Vespers: I fol. w (Vigil of Pentecost)
 30  Sat  L§ VIGIL OF PENTECOST                         [1cl] w
           Com: St Felix I, Pope & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. r (Whitsunday — Pentecost)
 31  Sun     WHITSUNDAY — PENTECOST                     [1cl] r
           Com: St Petronilla, Virgin
           Vespers: II prec. r

JUNE
------------------------------------------------------------
  1  Mon     DAY II WITHIN THE OCTAVE OF PENTECOST      [1cl] r
           Vespers: II prec. r
  2  Tue     DAY III WITHIN THE OCTAVE OF PENTECOST     [1cl] r
           Com: Ss. Marcellinus, Peter & Erasmus, Martyrs
           Vespers: II prec. r
  3  Wed  L§ DAY IV WITHIN THE OCTAVE OF PENTECOST      [1cl] r
           Vespers: II prec. r
  4  Thu     DAY V WITHIN THE OCTAVE OF PENTECOST       [1cl] r
           Vespers: II prec. r
  5  Fri  L§ DAY VI WITHIN THE OCTAVE OF PENTECOST      [1cl] r
           Com: St Boniface, Bishop & Martyr
           Vespers: II prec. r
  6  Sat  L§ DAY VII WITHIN THE OCTAVE OF PENTECOST     [1cl] r
           Vespers: I fol. w (Trinity Sunday)
  7  Sun     TRINITY SUNDAY                             [1cl] w
           Com: I Sunday after Pentecost
           Vespers: II prec. w
  8  Mon     Feria                                            g
           Vespers: I fol. w (St Columba of Iona, Abbot)
  9  Tue     St Columba of Iona, Abbot                  [d]   w
           Com: Ss Primus & Felician, Martyrs
           Vespers: II prec. w
 10  Wed     Feria                                            g
           Com: St Margaret of Scotland, Queen & Widow
           Vespers: I fol. w (Corpus Christi)
 11  Thu     CORPUS CHRISTI                             [1cl] w
           Com: St. Barnabas, Apostle
           Vespers: II prec. w
 12  Fri  L  Day II within the Octave of Corpus Christi [sd]  w
           Com: Ss Basilides, Cyrinus, Nabor & Nazarius, Martyrs
 13  Sat     Day III within the Octave of Corpus Christi [sd]  w
           Vespers: I fol. g (II Sunday after Pentecost)
 14  Sun     II Sunday after Pentecost                  [sd]  g
           Com: St Basil the Great, Bishop, Confessor & Doctor
           Com: All Saints of Antioch
           Vespers: II prec. g
 15  Mon     Day V within the Octave of Corpus Christi  [sd]  w
           Com: Ss Vitus, Modestus & Crescentia, Martyrs
 16  Tue     Day VI within the Octave of Corpus Christi [sd]  w
 17  Wed     Day VII within the Octave of Corpus Christi [sd]  w
           Vespers: I fol. w (Octave Day of Corpus Christi)
 18  Thu     Octave Day of Corpus Christi               [gd]  w
           Com: St Ephrem the Syrian, Deacon, Confessor & Doctor
           Com: Ss Mark & Marcellianus, Martyrs
           Vespers: II prec. w
 19  Fri  L  Feria                                            g
           Com: Ss. Gervase & Protase, Martyrs
 20  Sat     Saturday Office of the B.V.M               [s]   w
           Com: St Silverius, Pope & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. g (III Sunday after Pentecost)
 21  Sun     III Sunday after Pentecost                 [sd]  g
           Vespers: II prec. g
 22  Mon     St Alban, Protomartyr of England           [d]   r
           Com: St Paulinus, Bishop & Confessor
           Vespers: II prec. r
 23  Tue     Vigil of St John the Baptist               [s]   v
           Com: St. Etheldreda, Queen & Virgin
           Vespers: I fol. w (Nativity of St. John the Baptist)
 24  Wed     NATIVITY OF ST. JOHN THE BAPTIST           [1cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 25  Thu     Day II within the Octave of St John Baptist [sd]  w
           Vespers: I fol. r (Ss. John & Paul, Martyrs)
 26  Fri  L  Ss. John & Paul, Martyrs                   [d]   r
           Com: Octave of the Compassion of Our Lord Jesus Christ
           Com: Day III within the Octave of St John Baptist
           Vespers: II prec. r
 27  Sat     Day IV within the Octave of St John Baptist [sd]  w
           Com: Vigil of Ss Peter & Paul
           Vespers: I fol. g (IV Sunday after Pentecost)
 28  Sun     IV Sunday after Pentecost                  [sd]  g
           Com: St Leo II, Bishop & Confessor
           Com: Day V within the Octave of St John Baptist
           Vespers: I fol. r (Ss. Peter and Paul, Apostles)
 29  Mon     SS. PETER AND PAUL, APOSTLES               [1cl] r
           Com: Day VI within the Octave of St John Baptist
           Vespers: II prec. r
 30  Tue     Commemoration of St Paul, Apostle          [gd]  w
           Com: Commemoration of St Peter, Apostle
           Com: Day VII within the Octave of St John Baptist
           Com: Day II within the Octave of Ss Peter & Paul
           Vespers: I fol. w (Octave of St John Baptist)

JULY
------------------------------------------------------------
  1  Wed     Octave of St John Baptist                  [gd]  w
           Com: Day III within the Octave of Ss Peter & Paul
           Vespers: I fol. w (Visitation of the Blessed Virgin Mary)
  2  Thu     Visitation of the Blessed Virgin Mary      [2cl] w
           Com: Ss. Processus & Martinian, Martyrs
           Com: St John of San Francisco, Bishop & Confessor
           Com: Day IV within the Octave of Ss Peter & Paul
           Vespers: II prec. w
  3  Fri  L  St Irenaeus of Lyons, Bishop & Martyr      [d]   r
           Com: Day V within the Octave of Ss Peter & Paul
           Vespers: II prec. r
  4  Sat     Day VI within the Octave of Ss Peter & Paul [sd]  r
           Vespers: I fol. g (V Sunday after Pentecost)
  5  Sun     V Sunday after Pentecost                   [sd]  g
           Com: Day VII within the Octave of Ss Peter & Paul
           Vespers: II prec. g
  6  Mon     The Octave of Ss Peter & Paul              [gd]  r
           Vespers: II prec. r
  7  Tue     Ss. Cyril and Methodius, Bishops & Confessors [d]   w
           Vespers: II prec. w
  8  Wed     Feria                                            g
  9  Thu     Feria                                            g
 10  Fri  L  Feria                                            g
           Com: The Seven Holy Brothers, with Ss Rufina & Secunda, Martyrs
           Com: St. Joseph of Damascus (Priest) & companions, Martyrs
 11  Sat     Saturday Office of the B.V.M               [s]   w
           Com: St Pius I, Pope & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. g (VI Sunday after Pentecost)
 12  Sun     VI Sunday after Pentecost                  [sd]  g
           Com: Ss. Nabor & Felix, Martyrs
           Vespers: II prec. g
 13  Mon     Feria                                            g
           Com: St Anacletus, Pope & Martyr
 14  Tue     Feria                                            g
           Vespers: I fol. w (St Vladimir of Kiev, King & Confessor)
 15  Wed     St Vladimir of Kiev, King & Confessor      [d]   w
           Com: St Henry, Emperor & Confessor
           Vespers: I fol. w (Our Lady of Einsiedeln)
 16  Thu     Our Lady of Einsiedeln                     [gd]  w
           Com: Ss Nicholas & Habib Khasha, Martyrs
           Vespers: II prec. w
 17  Fri  L  Feria                                            g
           Com: St Alexius, Confessor
           Vespers: I fol. w (Translation of St Raphael of Brooklyn)
 18  Sat     Translation of St Raphael of Brooklyn      [d]   w
           Com: St Sergius of Radonezh, Abbot
           Com: St Symphorosa & her seven sons, Martyrs
           Vespers: I fol. g (VII Sunday after Pentecost)
 19  Sun     VII Sunday after Pentecost                 [sd]  g
           Com: St Seraphim of Sarov, Priest & Confessor
           Vespers: II prec. g
 20  Mon     St Elias the Prophet                       [d]   w
           Com: St Margaret of Antioch, Virgin & Martyr
           Vespers: II prec. w
 21  Tue     Feria                                            g
           Com: St Praxedes, Virgin
           Vespers: I fol. w (St. Mary Magdalene)
 22  Wed     St. Mary Magdalene                         [gd]  w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 23  Thu     Feria                                            g
           Com: St Apollinaris of Ravenna, Bishop & Martyr
           Com: St John Cassian, Abbot
           Com: St Liborius, Bishop & Confessor
 24  Fri  L  Vigil of St. James                         [s]   v
           Com: St Christina, Virgin & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. r (St. James the Greater, Apostle)
 25  Sat     St. James the Greater, Apostle             [2cl] r
           Com: St Christopher, Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. w (St. Anne, Mother of the Blessed Virgin Mary)
 26  Sun     St. Anne, Mother of the Blessed Virgin Mary [2cl] w
           Com: VIII Sunday after Pentecost
           Vespers: II prec. w
 27  Mon     Feria                                            g
           Com: St Pantaleon, Martyr
 28  Tue     Feria                                            g
           Com: Ss. Nazarius, Celsus, Martyrs; St Victor, Pope & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. w (St. Martha of Bethany, Virgin)
 29  Wed     St. Martha of Bethany, Virgin              [d]   w
           Com: Ss. Felix II (Bishop), Simplicius, Faustinus & Beatrice, Martyrs
           Vespers: II prec. w
 30  Thu     Feria                                            g
           Com: Ss Abdon & Sennen, Martyrs
 31  Fri  L  Feria                                            g
           Vespers: I fol. w (Chains of St Peter, Apostle)

AUGUST
------------------------------------------------------------
  1  Sat     Chains of St Peter, Apostle                [gd]  w
           Com: Commemoration of St Paul, Apostle
           Com: Holy Maccabees, Martyrs
           Vespers: I fol. g (IX Sunday after Pentecost)
  2  Sun     IX Sunday after Pentecost                  [sd]  g
           Com: St Stephen, Pope & Martyr
           Vespers: II prec. g
  3  Mon     The Finding of St. Stephen, Protomartyr    [d]   r
           Vespers: II prec. r
  4  Tue     Feria                                            g
           Vespers: I fol. w (Dedication of Our Lady of the Snows)
  5  Wed     Dedication of Our Lady of the Snows        [gd]  w
           Com: St Oswald, King & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. w (Transfiguration of Our Lord)
  6  Thu     Transfiguration of Our Lord                [2cl] w
           Com: Ss. Sixtus II (Pope & Martyr), Felicissimus & Agapitus
           Vespers: II prec. w
  7  Fri  L  Feria                                            g
           Com: St Donatus, Bishop & Martyr
  8  Sat     Vigil of St. Lawrence, Martyr              [s]   v
           Com: Ss. Cyriacus, Largus & Smaragdus, Martyrs
           Vespers: I fol. g (X Sunday after Pentecost)
  9  Sun     X Sunday after Pentecost                   [sd]  g
           Com: St Romanus, Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. r (St. Lawrence, Martyr)
 10  Mon     St. Lawrence, Martyr                       [2cl] r
           Vespers: II prec. r
 11  Tue     Feria                                            g
           Com: Ss Tiburtius & Susanna, Martyrs
 12  Wed     Feria                                            g
           Vespers: I fol. w (St Maximus of Constantinople, Confessor)
 13  Thu     St Maximus of Constantinople, Confessor    [d]   w
           Com: Ss. Hippolytus & Cassian, Martyrs
           Vespers: II prec. w
 14  Fri  L§ Vigil of the Assumption                    [s]   v
           Com: St Eusebius, Priest & Confessor
           Vespers: I fol. w (Assumption of the Blessed Virgin Mary)
 15  Sat     ASSUMPTION OF THE BLESSED VIRGIN MARY      [1cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w
 16  Sun     St Joachim, Father of the B.V.M            [2cl] w
           Com: XI Sunday after Pentecost
           Com: Day II within the Octave of the Assumption
           Vespers: II prec. w
 17  Mon     Day III within the Octave of the Assumption [sd]  w
           Com: Octave of St Laurence
 18  Tue     Day IV within the Octave of the Assumption [sd]  w
           Com: St Agapitus, Martyr
           Com: St Helen, Empress
 19  Wed     Day V within the Octave of the Assumption  [sd]  w
 20  Thu     Day VI within the Octave of the Assumption [sd]  w
 21  Fri  L  Day VII within the Octave of the Assumption [sd]  w
           Vespers: I fol. w (Octave Day of the Assumption)
 22  Sat     Octave Day of the Assumption               [gd]  w
           Com: Ss. Timothy (Bishop), Hippolytus & Symphorian, Mm
           Com: Vigil of St. Bartholomew
           Vespers: I fol. g (XII Sunday after Pentecost)
 23  Sun     XII Sunday after Pentecost                 [sd]  g
           Vespers: I fol. r (St. Bartholomew, Apostle)
 24  Mon     St. Bartholomew, Apostle                   [2cl] r
           Vespers: II prec. r
 25  Tue     Feria                                            g
 26  Wed     Feria                                            g
           Com: St Zephyrinus, Pope & Martyr
 27  Thu     Feria                                            g
           Vespers: I fol. w (St Augustine of Hippo, Bishop, Confessor & Doctor)
 28  Fri  L  St Augustine of Hippo, Bishop, Confessor & Doctor [gd]  w
           Com: St Hermes, Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. r (Beheading of St. John the Baptist)
 29  Sat     Beheading of St. John the Baptist          [gd]  r
           Com: St Sabina, Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. g (XIII Sunday after Pentecost)
 30  Sun     XIII Sunday after Pentecost                [sd]  g
           Com: Ss. Felix & Adauctus, Martyrs
           Vespers: II prec. g
 31  Mon     Feria                                            g
           Com: St Aidan of Lindisfarne, Bishop & Confessor

  4  Fri  L  St Gorazde of Prague, Bishop & Martyr      [d]   r
           Vespers: II prec. r

           Vespers: I fol. g (XIV Sunday after Pentecost)
  6  Sun     XIV Sunday after Pentecost                 [sd]  g
           Vespers: II prec. g

           Vespers: I fol. r (Exaltation of the Holy Cross)

           Vespers: I fol. w (Seven Sorrows of the B.V.M)

           Vespers: II prec. w

           Vespers: II prec. r

           Vespers: I fol. g (XVI Sunday after Pentecost)

           Com: St Remigius, Bishop & Confessor
           Vespers: I fol. w (Holy Guardian Angels)
  2  Fri  L  Holy Guardian Angels                       [gd]  w
           Vespers: II prec. w
  3  Sat     Saturday Office of the B.V.M               [s]   w
           Vespers: I fol. g (XVIII Sunday after Pentecost)
  4  Sun     XVIII Sunday after Pentecost               [sd]  g
           Vespers: II prec. g
  5  Mon     St. Placidus & companions, Martyrs         [gd]  r
           Vespers: II prec. r
  6  Tue     Feria                                            g
           Vespers: I fol. w (The Holy Rosary of the Blessed Virgin Mary)

           Com: St. Mark of Rome, Bishop & Confessor
           Vespers: II prec. w

           Vespers: II prec. w

           Com: St Wilfrid, Bishop & Confessor

           Vespers: I fol. w (Our Lady of Walsingham)

           Vespers: II prec. w

           Vespers: I fol. r (St. Luke, Evangelist)

           Vespers: II prec. r

           Vespers: II prec. r

           Vespers: I fol. w (All Saints)

NOVEMBER
------------------------------------------------------------
  1  Sun     ALL SAINTS                                 [1cl] w
           Com: XXII Sunday after Pentecost
           Vespers: II prec. w
  2  Mon     All Souls' Day                             [d]   b
           Com: Day II within the Octave of All Saints
  3  Tue     Day III within the Octave of All Saints    [sd]  w
           Com: St Winifred, Virgin & Martyr
  4  Wed     Day IV within the Octave of All Saints     [sd]  w
           Com: Ss Vitalis & Agricola, Martyrs
  5  Thu     Day V within the Octave of All Saints      [sd]  w
           Com: St Elizabeth, Mother of St John Baptist
  6  Fri  L  Day VI within the Octave of All Saints     [sd]  w
  7  Sat     Day VII within the Octave of All Saints    [sd]  w
           Com: St Willibrord, Bishop & Confessor
           Vespers: I fol. g (XXIII Sunday after Pentecost)
  8  Sun     XXIII Sunday after Pentecost               [sd]  g
           Com: Four Crowned Martyrs
           Com: Octave Day of All Saints
           Vespers: II prec. g

           Vespers: II prec. w

           Com: Ss. Tryphon, Respicius & Nympha, Martyrs
           Vespers: I fol. w (St. Martin of Tours)

           Com: St Mennas, Martyr
           Vespers: II prec. w

           Com: St Martin I, Pope & Martyr
 13  Fri  L  Feria                                            g
           Com: St Britius of Tours, Bishop & Confessor

           Com: St Gregory Palamas, Bishop & Confessor
           Vespers: I fol. g (VI Sunday after Epiphany (Resumed))
 15  Sun     VI Sunday after Epiphany (Resumed)         [sd]  g
           Vespers: II prec. g

 17  Tue     Feria                                            g
           Com: St Gregory the Wonder-worker, Bishop & Confessor
           Com: St Hilda of Whitby, Virgin
           Vespers: I fol. w (Dedication of the Basilica of the Holy Apostles Peter & Paul)

           Vespers: II prec. w
 19  Thu     Feria                                            g
           Com: St Pontianus, Pope & Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. r (St Edmund, King & Martyr)
 20  Fri  L  St Edmund, King & Martyr                   [d]   r
           Vespers: I fol. w (Presentation of the Blessed Virgin Mary)

           Com: St Columbanus, Abbot

           Vespers: I fol. g (XXIV & Last Sunday after Pentecost)

           Vespers: II prec. g

           Com: St Felicitas, Martyr
           Vespers: II prec. r

           Com: St Chrysogonus, Martyr
           Vespers: I fol. r (St Catherine of Alexandria, Virgin & Martyr)

           Vespers: II prec. r
 26  Thu     Feria                                            g
           Com: St Peter of Alexandria, Bishop & Martyr
 27  Fri  L  Feria                                            g

           Vespers: I fol. v (I Sunday of Advent)

           Com: St Saturninus, Bishop & Martyr
           Vespers: II prec. v

           Vespers: II prec. r

DECEMBER
------------------------------------------------------------
  1  Tue  L  Feria                                            v
           Vespers: I fol. w (St Peter Chrysologus, Bishop, Confessor & Doctor)
  2  Wed  L§ St Peter Chrysologus, Bishop, Confessor & Doctor [d]   w
           Com: St Bibiana, Virgin & Martyr
           Vespers: II prec. w
  3  Thu  L  Feria                                            v
  4  Fri  L§ Feria                                            v
           Com: St Barbara, Virgin & Martyr
  5  Sat  L  Feria                                            v
           Com: St Sabbas of Judæa, Abbot
           Vespers: I fol. v (II Sunday of Advent)
  6  Sun  L  II Sunday of Advent                        [2cl] v
           Com: St. Nicholas
           Vespers: II prec. v
  7  Mon  L§ St. Ambrose                                [gd]  w
           Com: Vigil of the Conception
           Vespers: I fol. w (Conception of the Blessed Virgin Mary)
  8  Tue  L  Conception of the Blessed Virgin Mary      [2cl] w
           Vespers: II prec. w

           Vespers: I fol. p (III Sunday of Advent (Gaudete))

           Vespers: II prec. p

           Vespers: I fol. w (Octave of the Conception of the B.V.M)

           Vespers: II prec. w

           Com: St Eusebius of Vercelli, Bishop & Martyr
 17  Thu  L  Feria                                            v
           Vespers: I fol. v (Expectation of the B.V.M)
 18  Fri  L§ Expectation of the B.V.M                   [gd]  v
           Com: Advent Ember Friday
           Vespers: II prec. v
 19  Sat  L§ Advent Ember Saturday                      [sd]  v
           Vespers: I fol. v (IV Sunday of Advent)
 20  Sun  L  IV Sunday of Advent                        [2cl] v
           Vespers: II prec. v
 21  Mon  L§ St. Thomas, Apostle                        [2cl] r
           Vespers: II prec. r
 22  Tue  L  Feria                                            v
 23  Wed  L§ Feria                                            v
           Vespers: I fol. v (Vigil of the Nativity of Our Lord)
 24  Thu  L§ VIGIL OF THE NATIVITY OF OUR LORD          [1cl] v
           Vespers: I fol. w (Nativity of Our Lord Jesus Christ)
 25  Fri     NATIVITY OF OUR LORD JESUS CHRIST          [1cl] w
           Com: St Anastasia, Virgin & Martyr
           Vespers: II prec. w
 26  Sat     St. Stephen, Protomartyr                   [2cl] r
           Com: Day II within the Nativity Octave
           Vespers: I fol. w (St. John, Apostle and Evangelist)
 27  Sun     St. John, Apostle and Evangelist           [2cl] w
           Com: Day III within the Nativity Octave
           Vespers: I fol. v (Holy Innocents)
 28  Mon     Holy Innocents                             [2cl] v
           Com: Day IV within the Nativity Octave
           Vespers: II prec. v
 29  Tue     Sunday within the Octave of the Nativity   [sd]  w
           Com: Day V within the Nativity Octave
           Vespers: II prec. w
 30  Wed     Day VI within the Nativity Octave          [sd]  w
           Vespers: I fol. w (St. Sylvester I, Pope)
 31  Thu     St. Sylvester I, Pope                      [d]   w
           Com: Day VII within the Nativity Octave
           Vespers: I fol. w (Circumcision of Our Lord)
